hero.optimize1: Places that feel recognizably Korean, not copy-paste tourist picks
hero.optimize2: A better first Seoul trip for visitors who care about taste and atmosphere
hero.optimize3: Enough hidden gems that the whole guide feels personally collected by {name}
home.sectionSubtitle: A Seoul guide, made by a local
home.headline: The side of Seoul a local friend would actually show you
home.introParagraph: Not a generic city checklist, but a local's personal shortlist: places with warmth, beauty, good taste, and that unmistakable Korean texture. The main spots keep your trip easy to plan, while the hidden gems make it feel like a local friend is quietly letting you into her own favorite version of Seoul.
home.mainSpotsCount: {count} main spots for broad coverage across Seoul food, cafe, and bar essentials.
home.hiddenGemsCount: {count} hidden gems for places that feel quieter, more Korean, and less obvious to foreign visitors.
home.neighborhoodsCount: {count} neighborhoods represented, so routes can stay compact and local.
home.mapNote: Map exploration still sits below when a quick geographic sense-check is more useful than the list.
home.hiddenGemsHeadline: The more Korean, less obvious layer
home.hiddenGemsDescription: These eight are the ones that shift the app from "good Seoul recommendations" to "this was clearly made by someone local." Private hanok dining, certified traditional confectionery, mountain views, and tea spaces that do not read like default tourist picks.
home.filterDescription: The shortlist is big enough now that food type matters more than one long feed. Use category first, then narrow by subcategory when you want to compare similar places more quickly.

map.exploreAll: Explore all spots on Google Maps
detail.curatedFollowUps: Curated follow-ups that keep the mood coherent.

meta.tagline: Hidden Gems from a Local Friend
